parameters: “There’s no guarantee the next elevator won’t have anyone in it...

It’s a pain, but I guess I have to take the stairs…"

parameters.name: あーもうめちゃくちゃ！

parameters: It’s an auto-lock! It's acutally locked!!""
"M-My key—! Wait, even my phone’s still inside!
The only one who can open the door is the Janitor…!?"
"Wait—of course! I get along with the neighbor lady!
I’ll just ask her to help me!"
"Wow, I thought my heart was gonna give out...
Yep, I’m really a capable lady after all~..."
"I completely forgot— She's back at her parents' house!!!"
The janitors office is on the first floor...
立ち絵_羞恥_バスタオル
There's no way I can go to the admin room looking like this! ”
If the janitor's not around, I’m seriously gonna lose it!!"
Go to the Janitors Office on the first floor!

parameters.name: あーもうめちゃくちゃ！

parameters: "Eh… sis, what’s going on with that outfit?"
"Uh, no… it’s not what you think…
So… the package was left at the door… and my cat, and then the auto-lock…"
(Ahhh… someone’s watching me, someone’s watching me…!
On the same floor… and, no way, a guy saw me naked…)
(My face is on fire… I’m dying… burning up with embarrassment…!)
I didn’t realize someone like her lived on this floor…)
I’ve never come across a body like that, not even online…)
(She looks like she's having trouble... Maybe I can use helping her as a way to
(Seriously, I hate this… How am I supposed to face him starting tomorrow…)
"...Ah, umm... I'm in a hurry... I need to go..."
"What?! Ah.. Wait a minute! I'll get you something to-
(So squishy…! What the heck… my fingers are sinking in…)
Wait... what...! Um... stop...where are you touching...! ”
(Oh, crap… this… it’s been so long, I’m super sensitive…)
"W-wait… ufaah ♡ Uh, um…! P-please stop… let me go!
I-I’ll call for help if you go any further──"
(No matter how you slice it, me wandering around in this outfit is bad…!
But honestly, this situation is also pretty bad…!)
Sorry, I just couldn’t let go…"
"Ah, that was close… that was really dangerous…"

parameters.name: あーもうめちゃくちゃ！

parameters: \# Take the stairs down to the first floor!
Huh? Do houseplants really grow this big?"
"On second thought, the leaves are big too, so maybe there’s a chance…"
"...Well... it's better than being completely naked..."
